user.title: Add SM-3W Lite Meter
user.description: Enter the MQTT topic this meter publishes to (the same one configured on the device) and a name to identify it. You can repeat this step to add more meters.

error.no_message: No message was received on this topic within a few seconds. Check that the topic is correct and that the meter is on and publishing (you can test this under Settings > Devices & Services > MQTT > Listen to a topic).
